title: Yjs over Automerge for data-layer CRDT
rationale: Yjs wins on perf (frequent small mutations, 100-10k features), deeper plugin ecosystem (y-websocket, y-indexeddb, y-protocols), production convergence (TipTap, BlockNote, Hocuspocus). Automerge has cleaner semantics but ~200KB bundle and per-op cost unearned at this scale. GeoJSON FeatureCollection becomes a snapshot projection of Yjs doc, not source of truth.

title: Felt importer is read-only API-only GeoJSON snapshot — no binary container
rationale: Felt has no binary container format. Importer calls public API export, maps to .atlasdraw layer model. Import-only, no round-trip, no sync. Permissive: log warnings on unknown feature types, never throw. 'Read your Felt files' is the key migration narrative unlock for Show HN.

description: togeojson package deprecated. @mapbox/togeojson ^0.16.2 is the maintained fork.
geojsonhint package archived. @placemarkio/check-geojson is the maintained replacement for GeoJSON validation.

FSA (File System Access API) assumed as primary persistence path — wrong. FSA is Chromium-only. IndexedDB binary blob is the primary path for Firefox/Safari (~30-40% users). Plans assuming FSA as default exclude a third of users.
resolution: IndexedDB is primary path. FSA is opt-in enhancement for Chromium. Both paths must be tested in browser matrix.

content: skeleton package bootstrap on first non-trivial code: when first real code lands in a previously-skeleton package, expect bootstrap modifications to package.json (type:module, test script, @types dependencies) and vitest.config.ts. Wave 1b T10 worker added these to code/packages/data/ (normally workers don't modify package.json but acceptance command required it).

description: Blob.type silently dropped through zip writer — ZIP format has no per-entry MIME field. Source PNG with type:'image/png' round-trips with type:'' after write()→read(). Bytes are byte-identical. Test in code/packages/data/src/round-trip.test.ts pins roundBlob.type==='' so a future fix breaks it loudly. Consumers needing MIME must derive from filename extension.
resolution: accepted-by-design: pin test to empty string; derive MIME from filename extension in consumers

description: styleRef:null round-trips inconsistently across the two writers — atlasdraw.ts (zip) does JSON.stringify(doc.styleRef ?? {}) so null→{}; atlasdraw-json.ts does doc.styleRef ?? null so null→null. Same input, different outputs. Both writers frozen post-W2.
resolution: unresolved — both writers frozen; consumers must handle both {} and null as 'no style ref'

title: idb (typed) + custom trailing+ceiling debounce for atlasdraw persistence — not idb-keyval + lodash
rationale: Excalidraw's own LocalData.ts uses idb-keyval (line 20-27) + lodash debounce (line 118). Atlasdraw T8 persistence deliberately uses idb (typed schema control via openDB) with a custom trailing-edge debounce + 30s ceiling timer per Plan Q3. Motivation: typed schema migration path and ceiling timer for crash safety. Do not conflate the two patterns — they coexist in the codebase. mx-3cac9d covers FSA/IndexedDB primary-path decision.
